name: sd_a10_declorder_acc
drl:
rule "RO"
when
    $l : LK($v : f0)
    accumulate(LK(f0 == $v); $c : count())
then
end
rule "RJ"
when
    not LK()
then
    insertLogical(new LK(7));
end
_finding: oracle [RJ,RO] vs engine [RJ]: the min812 mechanism renamed — acc observer declared first; a9 proves the acc was never load-bearing. D-187 L-SD row: (cloud x self-defeat) landing — EAGER justifier (no-loop/dyn-sal) => drop lands at the firing's eager-flush, no <=-salience glimpse, queue position irrelevant (a14, min608/fz_7_608); LAZY justifier => drop lands at the justifier's ITEM POP — same-salience observers glimpse iff queue position precedes the justifier's item (decl order in same-firing-born shapes; a13 split), k irrelevant (a15); strictly-higher always glimpses (t11), strictly-lower never.
